name: tinkerquarry
description: Local-first AI CAD workflow for printable objects

scripts.test:ui:coverage: cd apps/ui && pnpm test:coverage -- --runInBand src/hooks/__tests__/useAiAgent.test.tsx src/hooks/__tests__/useOpenScad.test.tsx src/services/__tests__/renderService.test.ts src/platform/__tests__/index.test.tsx src/stores/__tests__/apiKeyStore.test.tsx src/components/__tests__/ProductEvidencePanels.test.tsx src/stores/__tests__/layoutStore.test.ts
scripts.test:web:coverage: cd apps/web && pnpm test:coverage -- --runInBand functions/_lib/__tests__/share.test.ts functions/api/__tests__/share.test.ts functions/s/__tests__/shareMeta.test.ts
scripts.test:web:share-deploy: pnpm web:share:build && pnpm --filter web share:functions:build && pnpm --filter web share:rate-limiter:check
scripts.test:rust:audit: cd apps/ui/src-tauri && cargo audit --ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0194 --ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0195
scripts.test:gate: pnpm -r lint && pnpm -r type-check && pnpm test:rust && pnpm test:rust:audit && pnpm test:unit:coverage && pnpm test:web:share-deploy && cd apps/ui && node --experimental-vm-modules --no-warnings node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand && cd ../.. && pnpm test:web:unit && node scripts/run-engine-pytest.mjs && pnpm test:e2e:web
scripts.test:release: pnpm test:gate && scripts\native-release.cmd && pnpm test:e2e:tauri && pnpm test:e2e:tauri:installed
scripts.validate:changes: pnpm -r lint && pnpm -r type-check && pnpm test:scripts
